info.name: MintBird API
info.description:
MintBird API Collection with auth_key authentication.

## Authentication
All endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer {{auth_key}}` header.

## Base URL
{{base_url}}/api/v1

## Common Error Responses

### 401 Unauthorized
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Unauthorized"
}
```

### 404 Not Found
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Resource not found."
}
```

### 422 Validation Error
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": {
    "field": ["The field is required."]
  }
}
```

### 500 Server Error
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Server error: ..."
}
```

variable.description: API Base URL (change to https://api.poplinks.io/ for production)
Your MintBird API authentication key (found in account settings)

request.description:
Get available system domains for poplinks.

Use these domain URLs when creating poplinks with `domain_type: "system"`.

response.name: Success Response

request.description: Get your personal domains.
Get your groups.
Get your vendors.
Get available dynamic templates.

Get all poplinks for the authenticated user with stats.

### Response Fields
- `id`: Poplink ID
- `name`: Poplink name
- `destination_url`: Target URL
- `visible_url`: URL slug
- `domain_id`: Domain ID or system domain URL
- `domain_type`: 'personal' or 'system'
- `status`: 1=Active, 2=Pending, 3=Expired, 4=Inactive
- `stats`: Click statistics (total_clicks, unique_visitors, desktop, mobile)
- `vendors`: Associated vendor
- `groups`: Associated group
- `domains`: Associated domain

response.name: Success Response

request.description: Get a single poplink with detailed stats.

Get click data for a poplink (paginated, 50 per page).

### Path Parameters
- `id` (required): The Poplink ID

### Query Parameters
- `page` (optional): Page number for pagination (default: 1)

### Response Fields
- `country_name`: Country name
- `country_code`: Country code
- `city_name`: City name
- `user_agent`: Device type (isDesktop/isMobile)
- `tier`: Traffic tier (1-5)
- `created_at`: Click timestamp

body.raw:
{
  "name": "My Campaign Link",
  "destination_url": "https://example.com/landing",
  "visible_url": "my-campaign",
  "domain_id": 1,
  "domain_type": "personal",
  "group_id": null,
  "vendor_id": null,
  "isAdvanced": 0,
  "is_clocked": 0,
  "start_date": null,
  "end_date": null
}

request.description:
Create a new poplink.

### Domain Configuration
- **System Domain**: Set `domain_type` to `"system"`. In `domain_id`, you must provide the **System Domain URL** as a string (e.g. `"https://redeyedeal.com"`). Use the `Get System Domains` endpoint to see valid options.
- **Personal Domain**: Set `domain_type` to `"personal"`. In `domain_id`, you must provide the **numeric ID** of your domain (e.g. `123`). Use the `Get Personal Domains` endpoint to find your IDs.

### Parameters
- `name` (required): Name of the poplink
- `destination_url` (required): The URL to redirect to
- `visible_url` (required): The URL slug (e.g. `my-offer`)
- `domain_id` (required): The System URL or Personal Domain ID, depending on `domain_type`
- `domain_type` (optional): `"personal"` or `"system"` (default: personal)
- `group_id` (optional): Group ID
- `vendor_id` (optional): Vendor ID
- `isAdvanced` (optional): 1 or 0
- `is_clocked` (optional): 1 or 0
- `start_date` (optional): Start date YYYY-MM-DD
- `end_date` (optional): End date YYYY-MM-DD

response.name: Success Response

request.description: Get all lead capture pages for the authenticated user.
Get a single lead page with settings.

Create a new lead capture page.

### Parameters
- `name` (required): Name of the page
- `category_id` (optional): Category ID (default: 1)
- `template_id` (optional): Dynamic Template ID (default: first available)

response.name: Success Response
Beta Limit Error

request.description:
Update URL settings for a lead page.

### Path Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | integer | Yes | The Lead Page ID |

### Request Body Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `leadpage_keyword` | string | Yes | The URL slug for the main lead page (e.g. `my-capture-page`). Max 255 characters. Spaces will be removed automatically. |
| `conf_keyword` | string | No | The URL slug for the confirmation/thank-you page (e.g. `my-thank-you`). Max 255 characters. Must be different from `leadpage_keyword`. |
| `domain_id` | integer | No | The ID of your personal domain. Use `Get Personal Domains` endpoint to find available IDs. |
| `domain_type` | string | No | Domain type: `"personal"` or `"system"`. Default: keeps existing value. |
| `redirect_type` | string | No | After form submission: `"conf_page"` (show confirmation page) or `"url"` (redirect to external URL). |

### Validation Rules
- `leadpage_keyword` and `conf_keyword` must be unique across your poplinks, funnels, and snippets on the same domain
- `leadpage_keyword` and `conf_keyword` cannot be the same value
- `domain_id` must exist and belong to you

response.name: Success Response
Duplicate Keyword Error
Same Keyword Error
Validation Error

request.description: Get all bridge pages for the authenticated user.
Get a single bridge page.

Create a new bridge page.

### Parameters
- `name` (required): Name of the page
- `category_id` (optional): Category ID (default: 2)
- `template_id` (optional): Dynamic Template ID (default: first available)

response.name: Success Response
Beta Limit Error

request.description:
Update URL settings for a bridge page.

### Path Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | integer | Yes | The Bridge Page ID |

### Request Body Parameters
| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `leadpage_keyword` | string | Yes | The URL slug for the bridge page (e.g. `my-bridge-page`). Max 255 characters. Spaces will be removed automatically. |
| `redirect_url` | string (URL) | No | The destination URL where users will be redirected after viewing the bridge page (e.g. `https://example.com/offer`). Must be a valid URL. |
| `domain_id` | integer | No | The ID of your personal domain. Use `Get Personal Domains` endpoint to find available IDs. |
| `domain_type` | string | No | Domain type: `"personal"` or `"system"`. Default: keeps existing value. |
| `redirect_type` | string | No | Redirect behavior: `"url"` (redirect to `redirect_url`) or `"conf_page"` (show confirmation page). |

### Validation Rules
- `leadpage_keyword` must be unique across your poplinks, funnels, and snippets on the same domain
- `redirect_url` must be a valid URL format (e.g. `https://example.com/page`)
- `domain_id` must exist and belong to you

response.name: Success Response
Duplicate Keyword Error
Invalid URL Error
Validation Error

request.description:
Get all captured leads for the authenticated user (paginated, 20 per page).

### Query Parameters
- `page` (optional): Page number for pagination (default: 1)

### Response
Returns leads with associated `funnel` and `funnel_link` relationships.

variable.description: Funnel ID (Lead Page or Bridge Page ID)

request.description:
Get leads for a specific funnel (paginated, 20 per page).

### Path Parameters
- `funnel_id` (required): The Funnel ID (Lead Page or Bridge Page ID)

### Query Parameters
- `page` (optional): Page number for pagination (default: 1)

### Response
Returns leads with associated `funnel_link` relationship.

query.description: Optional: 1 for lead pages, 2 for bridge pages

request.description: Get all funnel categories.

Create a new funnel category.

### Parameters
- `name` (required): Category Name
- `type` (required): `1` for lead page, `2` for bridge page
- `domain_id` (optional): Default domain ID associated with this category

request.description:
Update a funnel category.

### Parameters
- `name` (required): New Category Name
- `domain_id` (optional): Default domain ID associated with this category
Delete a funnel category (must be empty).

Get overall stats summary for your account.

### Response Fields
- `poplinks.total`: Total number of poplinks
- `poplinks.clicks`: Total clicks across all poplinks
- `funnels.total`: Total number of funnels (lead pages + bridge pages)
- `funnels.views`: Total funnel page views
- `funnels.leads`: Total captured leads

response.name: Success Response
